```{python}
#| include: false
import yaml
from datetime import datetime

# Load resume data for personal info
with open('/Users/shakes/DevProjects/jobsearch/templates/resume/data/resume-data.yml', 'r') as f:
    resume_data = yaml.safe_load(f)

personal = resume_data['personal']
current_date = datetime.now().strftime("%B %d, %Y")

# Job-specific variables (to be set in the calling document)
# company_name, position_title, hiring_manager, company_location
```

# `{python} personal['firstname']` `{python} personal['lastname']`
**`{python} personal['positions'][0]`**

📧 `{python} personal['email']` | 📱 `{python} personal['phone']` | 📍 `{python} personal['address']`  
🔗 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/`{python} personal['linkedin']`) | 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/`{python} personal['github']`)

---

`{python} current_date`

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(f"**{hiring_manager}**")
print(f"{company_name}")
if 'company_location' in locals():
    print(f"{company_location}")
print()
print(f"**RE: {position_title} Position**")
```

Dear `{python} hiring_manager.split()[0] if hiring_manager != "Hiring Manager" else "Hiring Manager"`,
